title: UK overseas trade in goods statistics November 2024: import and export data
body: "The following tables contain EU and non-EU import and export data for November 2024 at chapter level.                UK overseas trade in goods statistics November 2024: imports    ODS, 25.8 KB     This file is in an OpenDocument format                 UK overseas trade in goods statistics November 2024: exports    ODS, 25.6 KB     This file is in an OpenDocument format    "
